name: Sparebanken More
summary: Sparebanken M√É¬∏re, together with its subsidiaries, provides banking services for retail and corporate customers primarily in M√É¬∏re og Romsdal, Norway. It operates through Corporate, Retail, and Real Estate Brokerage segments. As of December 31, 2020, it operated through a network of 27 branches. The company was founded in 1843 and is headquartered in √É¬Ölesund, Norway.
